metadata.description: 47 expert-level domain skills and 10 specialized agents for production engineering

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: Core software engineering skills: TypeScript, Python, Node.js, Next.js/React, frontend development, REST API design, PostgreSQL, data modeling, Docker, DevOps/CI-CD, and performance optimization

plugins.name: quality-skills
plugins.description: Code quality, testing, security, and architecture skills: code review, simplification, QA testing, debugging, security analysis, software architecture, observability, and Git workflows

plugins.name: business-skills
plugins.description: Business, marketing, and content skills: business analysis, technical writing, copywriting, SEO, analytics, pricing strategy, growth experiments, and product marketing

plugins.name: tooling-skills
plugins.description: CLI and tooling skills for Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Gemini, Atlassian Cloud, Excalidraw diagrams, and browser automation
